metadata.description: A collection of Claude Code plugins and skills

plugins.name: mcp-apps
plugins.description: Skills for building and migrating MCP Apps with interactive UIs

plugins.name: plugin-toolkit
plugins.description: Tools for analyzing, polishing, and managing Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: dimensional-modeling
plugins.description: Kimball-style dimensional modeling patterns for DuckDB star schemas in agent systems. SessionStart hook auto-injects principles when DuckDB or fact/dim tables detected.

plugins.name: tui-design
plugins.description: Design functional, readable terminal UIs with proper visual hierarchy, semantic color, and responsive layout. SessionStart hook auto-injects principles when Rich/Textual/Click detected.

plugins.name: mece-decomposer
plugins.description: MECE decomposition of goals, tasks, and workflows into Agent SDK-ready components with interactive tree visualizer. SessionStart hook auto-injects principles when Agent SDK or decomposition files detected.

plugins.name: skill-dashboard
plugins.description: Interactive MCP App dashboard: quality checks, token budgets, freshness, and repo hygiene

plugins.name: env-forge
plugins.description: Generate and launch database-backed MCP tool environments from scenario descriptions or the AWM-1K catalog. SessionStart hook auto-injects principles when .env-forge or fastapi-mcp detected.

plugins.name: dev-conventions
plugins.description: Development conventions with auto-detection: SessionStart hook detects Python/JS projects and injects uv, orjson, bun, TDD, version pinning, and doc conventions into context. Skills provide detailed reference on demand including dependency security auditing.

plugins.name: readwise-reader
plugins.description: Search, save, and surface your Readwise Reader library via MCP server with OAuth, DuckDB storage, and full-text search

plugins.name: agent-state-mcp
plugins.description: Read-only MCP server over ~/.claude/agent_state.duckdb -- query run history, watermarks, skill versions, and flywheel metrics instead of shelling out to the agent-state CLI.

plugins.name: skill-maintainer
plugins.description: Maintenance tools for skills repos: validation, quality, freshness, upstream detection, best practices review

plugins.name: json-query
plugins.description: JSON query tool selection and syntax — jg (jsongrep) for fast extraction, jq for transformations

plugins.name: scan-for-secrets
plugins.description: Pre-share scanner: wraps simonw/scan-for-secrets for literal matches (with escape variants) and composes a ripgrep regex pass for privacy-sensitive paths, emails, API key shapes, and SSH fingerprints.

plugins.name: path-privacy
plugins.description: Enforces a single rule: every path written into a repo must be relative to the repo root. Ships a SessionStart directive plus pre-commit and commit-msg git hooks that hard-block commits whose staged files, message, or branch name reference anything outside the repo.
